# ConnectX

> No networking. No job boards. Just the people you need to start your startup.

ConnectX helps builders and startups find co-founders, early teammates, and the right people to build with — through intent-based matching rather than profile-browsing.

## Pages

- [Home](/): What ConnectX is, how it works, and waitlist signup.
- [Find a Co-Founder](/find-a-cofounder): How founders use ConnectX to find a technical or business co-founder.
- [Connects Founders](/connects-founders): How ConnectX connects founders with builders and early teammates.
- [CoFoundersLab Alternative](/cofounderslab-alternative): ConnectX vs CoFoundersLab comparison.
- [Find a Technical Co-Founder](/find-a-technical-cofounder): Match with engineers and CTOs ready to build.
- [Bumble for Co-Founders](/bumble-for-cofounders): Swipe-and-match co-founder discovery.
- [Bumble for Startups](/bumble-for-startups): Startups matching with builders.
- [Tinder for Co-Founders](/tinder-for-cofounders): Fast swipe-style co-founder matching.
- [Tinder for Startups](/tinder-for-startups): Startups swipe with builders.
- [YC Co-Founder Matching Alternative](/yc-cofounder-match-alternative): Open alternative to YC's tool.
- [YC Alternative for Asia](/yc-cofounder-match-alternative-asia): Co-founder matching for Asia.
- [YC Startup Matching for Indonesia](/yc-startup-match-alternative-indonesia): Indonesia-first matching.

## Regional pages — SEA, APAC, South Asia, Middle East

Each region has two pages: `/find-a-cofounder-{slug}` and `/startup-matching-{slug}`.

Cities: singapore, jakarta, bangkok, manila, kuala-lumpur, ho-chi-minh, hanoi, tokyo, seoul, hong-kong, taipei, sydney, bangalore, mumbai, delhi, karachi, dhaka, dubai, abu-dhabi, riyadh, tel-aviv, cairo, doha.

Countries: indonesia, thailand, vietnam, philippines, malaysia, india, pakistan, bangladesh, uae, saudi-arabia, israel, qatar, japan, south-korea, taiwan.
- [App Demo (Free)](/app): Interactive mobile playground showing the free matching experience.
- [App Demo (Premium)](/app/premium): Interactive playground showing Premium features.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Community Guidelines](/community-guidelines): Community rules.
